ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., Router, Switch) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the node */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the node */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the node's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the node's location */,
  "installed_date" TEXT /* Date when the node was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node related to this metric */,
  "resistance" REAL /* Resistance value of the node */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Metric value measured at the node */,
  "max_level" INTEGER /* Maximum level recorded for the metric */,
  "avg_level" REAL /* Average level recorded for the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time when the metric was recorded */,
  "min_level" REAL /* Minimum level recorded for the metric */,
  "std_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the metric values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., High Resistance, Metric Threshold Exceeded) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who acknowledged the alert */,
  "acknowledged_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was acknowledged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_metrics" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric related to this historical entry */,
  "resistance" REAL /* Resistance value recorded historically */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Metric value recorded historically */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., engineer, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string that contains permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the role */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the node type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the node type */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the node type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert history record */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that is logged */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_history_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "source_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source node in the connection */,
  "destination_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination node in the connection */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., wired, wireless) */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the connection */,
  "connection_status" TEXT /* Current status of the connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_connections_source_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_connections_destination_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)
